horses.name: Henry LN
horses.catalog_text:
Swedish roots for exclusive Heartbreaker colt

Henry LN is an interesting colt by the legendary Heartbreaker out of the Swedish warmblood mare Main Hillary. This Clinton I daughter competed in sport herself and is the half-sister of the famous Grand Prix jumpers Main Road and Cadence. With Shane Sweetnam, Main Road jumped at the very highest level, winning the Tryon Grand Prix, was runner-up in the Dublin Nations Cup and second in the Toronto World Cup. Cadence jumped at top level with both Jack Hardin Towell and Jennifer Gates. Furthermore, granddam Main Mirco produced the 1.50m showjumper Marion Zetta and great-granddam Main Point stood also at the base of several international 1.50m showjumpers.

Breeder: L. Nieberg, Weert.

horses.name: Nikita GB
horses.catalog_text:
Everything you need for a Grand Prix showjumper

Nikita GB is one of the greatest talents of her age group. Last year, she convinced at the Blom KWPN Championships with a double clear round in the final for five-year-old showjumpers, qualifying her for the World Championships in Lanaken. This year at the Sunshine Tour, she continued her excellent results with one clear round after another. To date, Nikita GB has jumped clear in 10 out of 12 international classes. She has extra quality, striking scope, good rideability and a fantastic canter. Her sire Comthago VDL is an exceptionally talented horse under the saddle of Hessel Hoekstra and, furthermore, Nikita GB is bred out of the highly successful Niki damline.

horses.name: Exzellenz KEY
horses.pedigree_raw: Eldorado Van De Zeshoek TN x Verdi TN
horses.catalog_text:
Son of Eldorado van de Zeshoek TN from the family of Usha van ‘t Roosakker

The line of Usha van ‘t Roosakker has been producing international Grand Prix showjumpers for decades and even today many ‘Roosakkers’ are still jumping at top level. Exzellenz Key is a son of Grand Prix sire Eldorado van de Zeshoek TN and via Verdi TN daughter VIP Key SR goes back to the successful broodmare Grand Cru van ‘t Hagenhof. She produced no less than five international showjumpers and is a direct daughter of Michel Hecart’s 1.60m jumping mare Babbe van ‘t Roosakker. Babbe in turn produced the well-known horses Erco van ‘t Roosakker, Bingo, Giorgio van ’t Hagenhof and Dulhan de la Roque. Her dam Usha van ‘t Roosakker is the founder of this famous lineage.

Breeder: Keystud, Roggel.

horses.name: Olaise NJ
horses.pedigree_raw: Falaise De Muze x Durango VDL
horses.catalog_text: The Falaise de Muze son Olaise NJ started his competition career relatively late, but is already successfully performing in the classes for five-year-old showjumpers. In doing so, Olaise NJ shows a lot of quality, a good uphill canter, plenty of blood and scope for the bigger classes. All in all, Olaise NJ is the complete package you are looking for in a showjumping talent. Sire Falaise de Muze already produced several successful horses, such as Hurricane DD, Ivory TCS and Just Special VK. Dam Irango Blue NJ herself jumped at international level in the sport and is the half-sister of Kailon, who is successful at 1.60m level with Hendrik-Jan Schuttert.

horses.name: Ugaki DBL
horses.pedigree_raw: Baltic VDL x Zirocco Blue VDL
horses.catalog_text:
Out of sister to Grand Prix horses Farona, Corona & Durango VDL

Baltic VDL is making his mark in breeding with a remarkable number of offspring at the very highest level, including Martin Fuchs’ world class Leone JEI, Ben Maher’s Faltic HB and McLain Ward’s Ilex. Another Grand Prix example of Baltic VDL is Daniel Coyle’s Farona; this colt Ugaki DBL is a son of Baltic VDL out of the half-sister of the successful Farona. In addition, dam Herona herself is the full sister of the Grand Prix showjumper and KWPN approved stallion Durango VDL and also the half-sister of 1.60m showjumper Corona. Ugaki DBL’s damline has produced dozens of international showjumpers over the years; for example, great-granddam Rebekka produced the famous Opstalan’s Power ridden by Albert Voorn and the late Hubert Bourdy, and furthermore, this is the line of Christina Liebherr’s L.B. Rendam and Marina Ehrnrooth’s Evli Luikka.

Breeder: T. Leeuwen, De Wijk.

horses.name: Maurie Z
horses.catalog_text: Maurie Z proved to be a real winner at a young age. He has won one young horse class after another and stands out time and time again for his superb technique, excellent canter and rideability. Last year, Maurie Z finished third in the final of the GMB Competition and has already won two classes for five-year-old showjumpers this year. Sire Milton Z is a son of Mylord Carthago and was produced to the highest level by Pim Mulder. With Jérome Guery, among others, Milton Z jumped successfully at 1.60m level. Grandsire Cornado NRW was another famous grey and jumped for many years with Marcus Ehning. This damline also already produced the famous 1.60m showjumper Prince de Revel. Maurie Z looks like a born champion with a bright future.

horses.name: Umay W
horses.pedigree_raw: Darry Lou x Bamako De Muze
horses.catalog_text:
Calgary winner Darry Lou meets Qerly Chin family

The colt – combines the world’s very best genes; firstly, Calgary winner Darry Lou, secondly, the brilliant family of Qerly Chin. Sire Darry Lou jumped with no fewer than three different riders to a top 10 ranking in the prestigious Rolex Grand Slam CP International Grand Prix at Spruce Meadows, Calgary, namely with Harrie Smolders, Nayel Nassar and Beezie Madden – under the latter, he even secured the victory in this Grand Prix. Darry Lou is a son of Tangelo van de Zuuthoeve and goes back to the well-known mare Burggravin. This colt – is a son of Bamako de Muze daughter Paradis de Larcotique SPS – a great-granddaughter of the legendary Narcotique de Muze II. This makes the colt closely related to Levis de Muze, Vagabond de la Pomme, Killer Queen VDM and many more.

Breeder: Stal Wezenberg, Ijsselmuiden.

horses.name: Nashville VHR
horses.catalog_text:
Six-year-old talent by Toulon with International experience

Six-year-old Nashville VHR is a horse with everything he needs to excel in the higher classes. This son of Toulon stands out for his enormous scope and good rideability. He has now successfully made his international debut and is already jumping at 1.30m level. Nashville VHR is a horse with a great attitude and good willingness to work; he is level-headed but has the necessary blood. Sire Toulon has been producing top showjumpers for many years and Nashville VHR’s damline is also a successful one. For example, he is closely related to the well-known breeding stallion Etoulon VDL and also to success horses such as Broken Heart, Corleone, Divine Hero and Colord HS.

horses.name: Under Pressure Reuvekamp
horses.catalog_text:
Out of the sister of Rolex Grand Slam Grand Prix winner Highway TN

The colt Under Pressure Reuvekamps is bred out of the half-sister of one of the best showjumping horses of the moment: Highway TN. With Willem Greve, Highway TN became Dutch champion in 2022, won the Grand Prix of CHIO Rotterdam in 2023 and delivered the best Dutch result at the European Championships in Milan. In 2024, Highway TN continued his winning streak with first a second place in the Amsterdam World Cup and then his most prestigious victory to date: the win in the Rolex Grand Slam Grand Prix of ‘s-Hertogenbosch. Under Pressure Reuvekamps is a son of the promising Pegase van ‘t Ruytershof, who combines the genes of Comme Il Faut with Emerald’s famous damline. Via the Olympic Vivant van de Heffinck, this colt goes back to top stallions Chellano Z and Darco.

Breeder: B.J.M Reuvekamp, Heino.

horses.name: Ufira
horses.catalog_text:
Spectacular harness filly by top talent Olympus HS

With the addition of Ufira, this auction has something unique to offer. This spectacular harness horse foal is a daughter of the immensely talented Olympus HS – Jan Schuttert’s own harness horse stallion. Olympus HS was approved for breeding with fantastic scores and is stringing together one victory with another. This year, he already won the low limit class in De Wijk and last year he took the overall win in the KWPN/Westfort Stallion Competition.

Breeder: S.J. Cazemier, Jonkersvaart.

horses.name: Centurion AS Z
horses.catalog_text:
Modern talent with the genes of Chacco Blue

The five-year-old talent Centurion AS Z is a modern sporthorse as we like to see nowadays. This son of the powerful sire Chacfly PS has a lot of blood and jumps with excellent reflexes. He also has a great jumping technique and in particular finishes the jump very well from behind.Centurion AS Z is a highly careful horse with a bright future ahead of him. Sire Chacfly PS brings in the successful genes of top sire Chacco Blue and via the valuable Marome NW the pedigree goes back to the international showjumping mare Whoops. She produced, among others, the 1.50m showjumper Panda Love and is the sister of the Grand Prix showjumper Grand Desert.

horses.name: Upton Field
horses.catalog_text:
Sequence of Grand Prix stallions from the direct line of Vannan

Emerald, Cardento and Kannan all have in common that they have jumped at the very highest level and produced offspring that belong to the crème de la crème of the top sport. Upton Field combines these three stallions and also goes back to a particularly successful damline. Granddam Quano One de l’Eaugrenee is in fact the dam of Jeanne Sadran’s top stallion Vannan. This Diamant de Semilly son was a world-class talent from day one and later proved his qualities at the very highest level. Furthermore, Upton Field’s granddam is also the dam of Grand Prix showjumping horses Comme One Z, Understood Z and Vertigo Z. Great-granddam Ursula de l’Eaugrenee, in her turn, gave the top showjumping horse Enjoleuse de l’Eaugrenee of British rider Richard Davenport and stood at the base of international success horses such as Caviar de l’Heribus, Abie de la Motte, D Cancarra A.C., E-Contefino A.C. and Tainted Love of Bellerose.

Breeder: A. Koerhuis, Gorssel.

horses.name: Opium van de Bakker
horses.pedigree_raw: Halifax Van Het Kluizebos x Indorado
horses.catalog_text: Opium van de Bakker stands out not only because of his colour, but also because of his jumping quality and scope. This son of Halifax van ‘t Kluizebos is bred out of the Indorado mare Colorado HS, who competed at 1.50m level with Frank and Hendrik-Jan Schuttert. In breeding, Colorado HS already produced the international 1.50m showjumper Charmeur. Opium van de Bakker is a real eye-catcher and shows a lot of talent at the fence combined with a great canter. He is still a little less experienced in the show ring and has recently successfully jumped his first 1.10m courses. A talent for the future!

horses.name: Ebe Pleaser van ‘t Ijsselstein
horses.pedigree_raw: Epleaser Van T Heike x Berlin
horses.catalog_text:
Young lady from the line of Emerald

Ebe Pleaser van ‘t IJsselstein is bred out of the famous damline of sire Emerald. She is a daughter of Epleaser van ‘t Heike, successfully ridden by Christian Ahlmann and Frank Schuttert, and is bred out of the Berlin daughter Bronze LVP Z. This mare already produced the 1.60m showjumper Calciet EB Z ridden by Conor Swail. Via her international showjumping granddam Deviline van ‘t Ruytershof and great-granddam Dempsey van ‘t Ruytershof, the pedigree of Ebe Pleasure van ‘t IJsselstein traces back to top-class mare Carthina Z. She is not only dam of Olympic stallion Emerald but also of Nixon van ‘t Meulenhof, Diamanthina van ‘t Ruytershof and Ilusionata van ’t Meulenhof. In addition, Carthina Z stood at the base of top horses such as Le Blue Diamond van ‘t Ruytershof, Messi van ‘t Ruytershof, H&M Luna van ‘t Ruytershof and Jilbert van ’t Ruytershof.

Breeder: J. Noordman, Zwolle.
